SELECT value, value! FROM numbers WHERE value BETWEEN 0 AND 5;
SELECT value, (SELECT value! FROM numbers AS inner_table WHERE inner_table.value = numbers.value + 1) AS factorial_plus_one FROM numbers;
SELECT n.value, m.num, n.value! + m.num! AS combined_factorial FROM numbers AS n INNER JOIN more_numbers AS m ON n.value + m.num < 10;
CREATE TABLE temp_values AS SELECT value, value! FROM numbers WHERE value > 0;
SELECT t1.value, (SELECT MAX(value!) FROM temp_values) AS max_factorial FROM temp_values AS t1 WHERE t1.value < 5;
SELECT SUM(value!) AS total_factorial FROM numbers WHERE value <= 4;
